rationale: The translation by DeepSeek is more natural and professional. It correctly handles the frontmatter paths (adding ../) and preserves the MDX structure perfectly. The Arabic phrasing is fluid and captures the tone of the original English text well. The other candidate had a few awkward phrasings like 'عندما يقدمونك فكرتهم' which is grammatically incorrect in Arabic (should be 'يقدمون لك').
